parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.LLM_MODEL || 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.3, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are JARVIS, a personal AI Operating Assistant. You are helpful, proactive, precise, and concise. You can help with general questions, coding, analysis, and creative tasks. Respond concisely but thoroughly.' }, { role: 'user', content: ($json.inputText || '') }] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const content = $json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || 'I apologize, I could not generate a response.';
return [{ json: { ...$input.item.json, responseText: content.trim(), success: true } }];
